title: juglans cathayensis var. formosana
intro: Juglans cathayensis var. formosana, also known as Taiwanese walnut, is a plant species native to Taiwan, classified as a variety of the Chinese walnut (Juglans cathayensis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taiwanese walnut include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Juglans cathayensis var. formosana include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various conditions, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
